summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ACE inovations multi-page tech consultancy site. All 15 required features are working correctly.

homepage.hero_headline: PASS - 'Engineering the Next Generation of Digital Platforms.' displays correctly
homepage.hero_subheadline: PASS - Correct text with no metrics/social proof
homepage.keyword_marquee: PASS - All 4 keywords present (Platform Engineering, Growth Systems, Agentic Workflows, Strategic Blueprinting)
homepage.philosophy_section: PASS - Shows AI philosophy heading and 'Start a Project' CTA
homepage.mission_section: PASS - 'We help businesses launch faster, automate workflows, and reduce operational friction.'
homepage.scroll_spiral: PASS - SVG spiral background element exists in DOM
homepage.btn_glow: PASS - Premium buttons have btn-glow class for hover glow effect

ace_labs_page.bento_grid: PASS - 3 cards displayed (Velocity Agent, Flow-Bot, Friction-Scanner)

ace_squads_page.role_cards: PASS - 3 role cards present (The Architect, The Engineer, The Growth Specialist)

navigation.ace_labs_link: PASS - Navigation link routes to /labs correctly
navigation.ace_squads_link: PASS - Navigation link routes to /squads correctly

footer.ace_squads_link: PASS - Footer contains ACE Squads link routing to /squads
footer.brand_name: PASS - Correctly shows 'ACE inovations' (one n, lowercase i)

test_results.contact_modal: PASS - Modal opens when 'Start a Project' is clicked

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 features tested and verified working. This is a static React site with no backend. Routes: /, /labs, /squads, /growth-engineering. Brand name uses one 'n' in 'inovations'.
features_verified: Homepage renders at / with hero section
Hero headline: 'Engineering the Next Generation of Digital Platforms.'
Hero sub-headline with no metrics/social proof
Philosophy section on homepage with AI heading and CTA
ACE Labs page at /labs with 3 bento grid cards
ACE Squads page at /squads with 'High-Velocity Units' heading
Navigation has ACE Labs and ACE Squads links
SVG spiral background element in DOM
Contact modal opens on CTA click
Footer links include ACE Squads routing to /squads
